full_text:
Ding (Zisu) 丁 (子嗣)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ding (丁), styledZisu (子嗣), was born in Runan. A local officer, one of the Seven Heroes who shielded Zhao Qian after losing to Turbans. Ding was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Ding lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
